calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-05-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David M. Lilienstein of the law offices of DL Law Group (415.678.5050) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Deputy Attorney General, Lucy F. Wang of the California Department of Justice (415.703.5202) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party, Commissioner of the California Department of Insurance

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Court declares brief pause to review cited case law. The cause is argued further. The Court vacates the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend on the ground that there is no mandatory duty in this contract apart from the language itself. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Continued To Mar-22-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
is Off calendar as moot; Amended Complaint filed on December 9, 2016. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Rhonda Harris, CSR # 7414 =302/ru
